name: Service Configured to Use a Pipe
notes: This rule triggers when a service is configured to use a pipe.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5002197) A service was installed in a system
when the event matches Service Filename (custom) contains any of \\.\pipe\
TD_list: APPLY Service Configured to Use a Pipe on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5002197) A service was installed in a system
AND when the event matches Service Filename (custom) contains any of \\.\pipe\
RED_list: Event name: Detected a Service Configured to Use a Pipe
Event description: Detected a Service Configured to Use a Pipe
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
